title: ClearMarket Mark
description: Daily pricing and liquidity snapshot. One row per market per UTC date. Normalizes Kalshi + Polymarket into a single feed with consistent field names and units (USD). Populated via GitHub Actions daily cron against platform public APIs. v0.1 includes Polymarket CLOB calls to populate size and no-side fields.

snapshot_date.description: UTC calendar date of the snapshot. Unique with market_id (one mark per market per day).

snapshot_at.description: Exact moment of API pull (TIMESTAMPTZ). Distinct from snapshot_date.

source_updated_at.description: Venue's own 'last updated' timestamp (Kalshi updated_time, Polymarket updatedAt). Compare to snapshot_at for staleness.

yes_bid.description: Best bid price on the yes-side book. Decimal 0-1.

yes_ask.description: Best ask price on the yes-side book. Decimal 0-1.

no_bid.description: Best bid price on the no-side book. For Polymarket, populated via CLOB API call.

no_ask.description: Best ask price on the no-side book. For Polymarket, populated via CLOB API call.

yes_bid_size_usd.description: USD-normalized size at best yes-bid. Computed as contracts * price. TOP-OF-BOOK ONLY, not full-book depth.

yes_ask_size_usd.description: USD-normalized size at best yes-ask. TOP-OF-BOOK ONLY.

no_bid_size_usd.description: USD-normalized size at best no-bid. TOP-OF-BOOK ONLY.

no_ask_size_usd.description: USD-normalized size at best no-ask. TOP-OF-BOOK ONLY.

yes_last_price.description: Last traded price on the yes-side. Decimal 0-1.

implied_probability.description: For binary markets: equals yes_last_price. For scalar strike ladders: normalized probability mass across the ladder (computed at serve time).

volume_24h_usd.description: Dollar trading volume in the last 24 hours. Kalshi value is imputed (contracts * last_price); Polymarket value is native USDC.

volume_total_usd.description: Cumulative dollar trading volume since market opened. Kalshi value is imputed; Polymarket native.

open_interest_usd.description: Dollar value of positions currently held. Kalshi-native; NULL for Polymarket (not exposed without on-chain subgraph — v0.2+).

mark_method.description: How this mark was produced. 'venue_snapshot' = pulled directly from API (default). 'imputed_carry_forward' = prior day carried forward when venue returned no data. 'editorial_override' = manual correction (rare).

stale_flag.description: True if hours_since_source_update > STALENESS_THRESHOLD_HOURS (4). Warns consumer that the venue data itself is older than our freshness commitment.

source_count.description: Number of distinct API responses feeding this mark. 1 in v0.1. Reserved for future blended quotes.

raw_payload.description: Full raw API response(s) for audit. Preserves all venue-native fields not surfaced as first-class columns (contracts counts, umaBond, rewardsMaxSpread, fractional_trading_enabled, etc.).

spread.description: DERIVED AT API SERVE TIME. Computed as yes_ask - yes_bid.

mid.description: DERIVED AT API SERVE TIME. Computed as (yes_bid + yes_ask) / 2.

divergence_from_primary.description: DERIVED AT API SERVE TIME. abs(yes_last_price - this event's primary market's yes_last_price). Null when event has one market or no primary_market_id set.

hours_since_source_update.description: DERIVED AT API SERVE TIME. (snapshot_at - source_updated_at) in hours. Used to compute stale_flag.

field_provenance.description: Per-field provenance. Keys are field names; values indicate 'platform_api' / 'derived' / 'imputed' / 'null_by_venue_limitation'.
